name: puntos
description: Casual web game made with PhaserJS. Tap the falling fruits before they escape.
author: jarp <jarp@outlook.com>

scripts.build:itch: vite build --config vite.config.itch.js && ./publish/builds/fix-itch-paths.sh && cd dist-itch && zip -r ../publish/builds/puntos-itch.zip . -x '*.DS_Store' && cd .. && echo '✅ publish/builds/puntos-itch.zip ready for upload!'
